mapper.select: SELECT p.pid,ptitle,pbody,psendtime,lastreplytime,u.uid,u.uname,COUNT(f.fid) as favorite_count FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u on p.uid = u.uid LEFT JOIN favorite f on p.pid = f.pid GROUP BY p.pid,ptitle,pbody,psendtime,lastreplytime,u.uid,u.uname ORDER BY lastreplytime DESC

SELECT p.pid,p.ptitle,p.pbody,p.psendtime,u.uid,u.uname,COUNT(f.fid) as favorite_count FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u on p.uid = u.uid LEFT JOIN favorite f on p.pid = f.pid WHERE p.pid=#{value} GROUP BY p.pid,p.ptitle,p.pbody,p.psendtime,u.uid,u.uname

SELECT p.pid,ptitle,pbody,psendtime,lastreplytime,u.uid,u.uname,COUNT(f.fid) as favorite_count FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u on p.uid = u.uid LEFT JOIN favorite f on p.pid = f.pid GROUP BY p.pid,ptitle,pbody,psendtime,lastreplytime,u.uid,u.uname ORDER BY lastreplytime DESC LIMIT #{startPage},#{showPage}
